title: SAGE-Kit Node Result v1
description: A language-neutral envelope for observable decisions, evidence references, bounded findings, changed surface, and transition proposals. It does not store private reasoning, complete chat or tool transcripts, secrets, or credentials.

schema_id.description: Stable identity of the Node Result schema used by this instance.

schema_version.description: Version of the Node Result envelope.

status.description: Observable node state or outcome; this enum does not define a state machine. NO_ACTION_REQUIRED is distinct from SUCCEEDED, PASS, and WAIVED, and Stage 2B decides whether it satisfies a join. DONE_WITH_CONCERNS requires controller review, cannot auto-advance a phase or acceptance, cannot satisfy a required success join, and is not mapped to SUCCEEDED, PASS, or WAIVED.

changed_paths.description: Paths observably changed by the node; an empty array records no changed surface.

evidence_refs.description: References to bounded evidence, not embedded complete tool transcripts.

findings.description: Bounded observable findings, not private reasoning or transcript storage.

authority_change.description: When true, requests a higher-authority decision; it does not modify authority, a gate, or the project authority envelope.

proposed_next_nodes.description: Transition proposals only; they do not create, schedule, admit, or execute nodes.

inspected_scope.description: Non-empty scope inspected for an evidence-bound no-action decision.

decision.description: Observable bounded decision, not hidden reasoning.
